# arifOS — L3: BODY (AAA WIRE)
**The Sovereign Wire — High-Voltage Connector for AGI · ASI · APEX.**

---

## 🏛️ THE AAA INTERFACE (L3)

The AAA MCP is the transport layer of the arifOS Body. It provides the physical connectivity between an AI agent and the Sovereign OS.

### **The Agent Classes**

1.  **ARCHITECTS (AGI):** Plan and deconstruct (Δ MIND).
2.  **AGENTS (ASI):** Implement and forge (Ω HEART).
3.  **AUDITORS (APEX):** Critique and void (Ψ SOUL).

---

## 🛠️ THE WIRE (TRANSPORT MATRIX)

- **Domain:** [aaa.arif-fazil.com](https://aaa.arif-fazil.com)
- **Endpoint:** https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/mcp
- **Transport:** Streamable-HTTP (SSE)

---

---

*The Wire is the servant; the OS is the sovereign.*
